episodes.title: #228 Cults, True Crime, and Personal Transformation — A Deep Dive Into a Cult & Self-Growth
episodes.description: Karin and Michelle provide commentary on the documentary Trust Me: The False Prophet. We uncover gripping stories of cult manipulation, legal justice, and personal evolution in this episode. We'll explore the shocking case of Samuel Bateman, the psychological tactics used by cult leaders, and how individuals can reclaim their lives. P.S. If you're interested, this episode seems to be an epilogue to Episode 104 "Extremists are made, not born."-Walt Longmire. Episode 104 tells the story of what happened before Samuel Bateman. You might want to check it out.

episodes.title: #180 "Teal Swan: Healer or cult leader?"
episodes.description: ***Trigger Warning - there is some talk of suicide - not for kids! Michelle and Karin explore the world of Teal Swan and the documentary, "The Deep End." It's available on Apple TV, and you can find all kinds of info on her online. Let us know what you think! The story is incredible.
